summary: Ukrainian forces from the 59th Brigade's 1st battalion "Predators of Heights" downed a Russian Ka-52 attack helicopter near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, using a fiber-optic FPV drone, with follow-up strikes by Magyar's Birds drones eliminating the crew after a crash landing. This marks a rare instance of an FPV drone successfully destroying a helicopter. Elsewhere, an FPV drone struck a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island, and Iranian-backed militias launched a fiber-optic FPV attack on US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. Ukrainian forces are employing tactics such as disorienting Russian troops before strikes, and anti-aircraft units are using a mix of electronic warfare and small arms, particularly automatic rifles, to counter FPV kamikaze drones.
